lyrics.text: Yeah, you could be the greatest
You can be the best
You can be the King Kong banging on your chest
lyrics.translation: 你能像金刚一样自信满满的敲打胸脯

lyrics.text: You could beat the world
You could beat the war
You could talk to God, go banging on his door
lyrics.translation: 甚至能够与神对话  去敲打他的门

lyrics.text: You can throw your hands up
You can beat the clock
You can move a mountain
You can break rocks
You can be a master
Don't wait for luck
Dedicate yourself and you can find yourself
lyrics.translation: 放手一搏后你会恍然发现

lyrics.text: Standing in the hall of fame
And the world's gonna know your name
lyrics.translation: 你的英名将会被世界所知晓

lyrics.text: Cause you burn with the brightest flame
lyrics.translation: 因为你是最耀眼的一道火焰

lyrics.text: And the world's gonna know your name
lyrics.translation: 你的英名将被世界所铭记

lyrics.text: And you'll be on the walls of the hall of fame
lyrics.translation: 镌刻在名人堂的墙壁之上

lyrics.text: You could go the distance
You could run the mile
You could walk straight through hell with a smile
lyrics.translation: 你可以面带微笑直穿地狱

lyrics.text: You could be the hero
You could get the gold
Breaking all the records that thought never could be broken
lyrics.translation: 打破那些他们认为绝不可能被打破的记录

lyrics.text: Do it for your people
Do it for your pride
Never gonna know if you never even try
lyrics.translation: 试都不试一下怎么会知道自己的能耐

lyrics.text: Do it for your country
Do it for your name
Cause there's gonna be a day
When you're, standing in the hall of fame
lyrics.translation: 你将会身处名人堂之中

lyrics.text: And the world's gonna know your name
lyrics.translation: 你的英名将会被世界所知晓

lyrics.text: Cause you burn with the brightest flame
lyrics.translation: 因为你是最耀眼的一道火焰

lyrics.text: And the world's gonna know your name
lyrics.translation: 你的英名将被世界所铭记

lyrics.text: And you'll be on the walls of the hall of fame
lyrics.translation: 镌刻在名人堂的墙壁之上

lyrics.text: Be a champion
Be a champion
Be a champion
Be a champion
On the walls of the hall of fame
lyrics.translation: 镌刻在名人堂的墙壁之上吧

lyrics.text: Be students,Be teachers Be politicians,Be preachers
lyrics.translation: 无论  学生  老师   政治家   传教士

lyrics.text: Be believers,Be leaders
Be astronauts,Be champions,Be truth seekers
lyrics.translation: 或是 宇航员   都能成为冠军

lyrics.text: Be students,Be teachers Be politicians,Be preachers
lyrics.translation: 无论  学生  老师   政治家   传教士

lyrics.text: Be believers,Be leaders Be astronauts,Be champions
lyrics.translation: 信徒   领导者或是宇航员   都能成为冠军

And the world's gonna know your name

Standing in the hall of fame.
